mapper.insert: INSERT INTO party ( product_id, host_user_id, capacity, current_member_count, recruit_status, operation_status, vacancy_type, created_at, updated_at, terminated_at, price_per_member_snapshot ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{hostUserId}, #{capacity}, #{currentMemberCount}, #{recruitStatus}, #{operationStatus}, #{vacancyType}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{terminatedAt}, #{pricePerMemberSnapshot} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, product_id, host_user_id, capacity, current_member_count, recruit_status, operation_status, vacancy_type, created_at, updated_at, terminated_at, price_per_member_snapshot FROM party WHERE id = #{partyId}

SELECT id, product_id, host_user_id, capacity, current_member_count, recruit_status, operation_status, vacancy_type, created_at, updated_at, terminated_at, price_per_member_snapshot FROM party WHERE id = #{partyId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT id, product_id, host_user_id, capacity, current_member_count, recruit_status, operation_status, vacancy_type, created_at, updated_at, terminated_at, price_per_member_snapshot FROM party WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE party SET current_member_count = #{currentMemberCount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{partyId}
UPDATE party SET recruit_status = #{recruitStatus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{partyId}
